modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to print due to insufficient funds error.

full_description_text: The user is trying to print using the USD Print system but encounters an error. The message indicates insufficient funds and prompts them to swipe their USD ID. This issue prevents the user from completing their printing tasks.
short_description: Unable to print due to insufficient funds error.
description: The user is trying to print using the USD Print system but encounters an error. The message indicates insufficient funds and prompts them to swipe their USD ID. This issue prevents the user from completing their printing tasks.
